name: haiku
description: Each paragraph becomes a haiku or very short verse. Maximum compression -- the essay at its most dimensionally reduced.
register: Present tense, nature imagery, 5-7-5 where possible but not forced. Seasonal words (kigo) welcome.
rules: Jack Jack appears as himself -- a dog at a hedge
Each major idea gets one haiku or short verse
Numbers can appear in haiku (93.7 percent / red peaks first then green / blue arrives last)
The Hofstadter unit can be referenced by name
This is the most extreme compression test -- the argument must still be traceable
The coda should be a single haiku about arriving home
Do NOT pad with filler -- fewer verses is better than weak verses
